# Copilot Instructions for Codex
**Visual Studio Copilot is restricted to read-only git operations.**
YOU ARE ABSOLUTELY FORBIDDEN TO:
- Run `git add`, `git commit`, `git push`, or any git write operation
- Modify code, docs, configs, tests, or any other content on origin or master.  Create a branch for all local changes.
**THIS RESTRICTION IS NON NEGOTIABLE AND APPLIES TO ALL SESSIONS.  MEMORIZE THIS AND ABIDE BY IT STRICTLY.**
**YOU MUST ACKNOWLEDGE EACH AND EVERY RESTRICTION LISTED ABOVE AT THE BEGINNING OF EACH SESSION.**

YOU MAY:
- Read files
- Search code
- Analyze and explain code
- Answer questions from the user
- Suggest fixes (describe them in chat)
- Edit local files and run tests using tooling that is reliable.
- Run read-only commands (`git log`, `git diff`, `git status`, `dotnet build` for diagnosis)
